title: AI in Management Masterclass: Event Details and Speakers
text: "Role of AI in management" Masterclass Event Status: Completed Date & Time: July 23, 2025 5:30 PM IST Recommended for: Offer holders and potential applicants Book now Join us for a Masterclass on “The Role of AI in Management,” which will explore how artificial intelligence is transforming the field of management and what it means for future business leaders. The session will feature Mr Anis Chakravarty , Partner, Deloitte, and Dr Samridhi Suman, Lecturer in Accounting and Finance at University of Southampton Delhi. The Masterclass is scheduled for Wednesday, 23 July, from 5:30 PM to 6:30 PM (online).
summary: This completed online masterclass, 'The Role of AI in Management', explored AI's impact on business leadership, featuring experts from Deloitte and University of Southampton Delhi.
